title: UI: score procedures/evaluations list task-card parity and procedure filtering
description: Commit current list improvements, then remove procedure list muted wrapper and fix missing procedures in version scope.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Committed score/evaluation task-card parity. Removed muted wrapper/padding from procedure list and loosened version-scope filtering to include unindexed runs with unknown version linkage so touched-version runs are not hidden.
